title: Parts Feeding Dialog Calibration
description:
Parts Feeding Dialog Calibration

Calibration

This page describes feeder calibration, parameter editing, and testing.

Item	Description

Part	Specify the part to copy calibration results from.

Copy	Copy calibration results.

Copy calibration results.

Calibration & Test	Operates feeder calibration, parameter editing, and testing.

Tip:  The above values will be optimized when performing feeder calibration (refer to Feeder Calibration Wizard).

Refer to the following guidelines when changing these values.

- Reduce the amplitude of the corresponding action if parts are moved excessively or knocked off the platform.

If this still does not help, try reducing the operating time of the corresponding action.

- Increase the amplitude of the corresponding action if parts are not moved or spread out sufficiently.

If this still does not help, try increasing the operating time of the corresponding action.

- Reduce the amplitude of the corresponding action if the gross weight of parts (Weight of one part x number of loaded parts) is large, and the parts are not moved or spread out sufficiently.

When the <Calibrate> button is clicked, a project build error may occur.

In this case, click the <Close> button and rebuild with [project]...[rebuild].
